## Meeting Purpose

[Catch-up and explore potential collaboration between Marcel (fwd.digital) and Kerry (Homebase)](https://fathom.video/share/xEKuWySkTNeiKN9RapgzyKzxoQfGHt-B?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's agency is experiencing rapid growth, facing challenges with client expectations and scaling operations](https://fathom.video/share/xEKuWySkTNeiKN9RapgzyKzxoQfGHt-B?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [Kerry offered insights on building client trust and recommended "The Trusted Advisor" book for account management](https://fathom.video/share/xEKuWySkTNeiKN9RapgzyKzxoQfGHt-B?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
  - [Potential collaboration discussed, with Kerry possibly consulting on client onboarding and process optimization](https://fathom.video/share/xEKuWySkTNeiKN9RapgzyKzxoQfGHt-B?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)
  - [fwd.digital is expanding services, building a community, and developing proprietary technology solutions](https://fathom.video/share/xEKuWySkTNeiKN9RapgzyKzxoQfGHt-B?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)

## Topics

### fwd.digital's Current Challenges

  - [Dealing with varying client expectations and timelines (e.g., 3-month vs. 12-month engagements)](https://fathom.video/share/xEKuWySkTNeiKN9RapgzyKzxoQfGHt-B?tab=summary&timestamp=119.0)
  - [Balancing delivery of services, team growth, and technology development](https://fathom.video/share/xEKuWySkTNeiKN9RapgzyKzxoQfGHt-B?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Managing client trust and expectations, especially in early stages of engagements](https://fathom.video/share/xEKuWySkTNeiKN9RapgzyKzxoQfGHt-B?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Scaling operations while maintaining quality and client satisfaction](https://fathom.video/share/xEKuWySkTNeiKN9RapgzyKzxoQfGHt-B?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)

### Client Trust and Relationship Building

  - [Kerry emphasized the importance of building trust early in client relationships](https://fathom.video/share/xEKuWySkTNeiKN9RapgzyKzxoQfGHt-B?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [Recommended "The Trusted Advisor" book for account management strategies](https://fathom.video/share/xEKuWySkTNeiKN9RapgzyKzxoQfGHt-B?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
  - [Discussed the value of setting proper expectations and demonstrating value in both process and results](https://fathom.video/share/xEKuWySkTNeiKN9RapgzyKzxoQfGHt-B?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [Highlighted the need for a strong onboarding process to establish trust and alignment](https://fathom.video/share/xEKuWySkTNeiKN9RapgzyKzxoQfGHt-B?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)

### fwd.digital's Business Model and Vision

  - [Services: Delivering growth engines for clients ($15-27k/month engagements)](https://fathom.video/share/xEKuWySkTNeiKN9RapgzyKzxoQfGHt-B?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
  - [Community: Building a learning platform and expert network ("mean university")](https://fathom.video/share/xEKuWySkTNeiKN9RapgzyKzxoQfGHt-B?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Technology: Developing proprietary tools and microservices](https://fathom.video/share/xEKuWySkTNeiKN9RapgzyKzxoQfGHt-B?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
  - [Aim to create a self-reinforcing ecosystem of services, community, and technology products](https://fathom.video/share/xEKuWySkTNeiKN9RapgzyKzxoQfGHt-B?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)

### Potential Collaboration Opportunities

  - [Kerry offered to help with client intake, onboarding, and milestone mapping](https://fathom.video/share/xEKuWySkTNeiKN9RapgzyKzxoQfGHt-B?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
  - [Discussed creating replicable processes for different client types (B2B, B2B software, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/xEKuWySkTNeiKN9RapgzyKzxoQfGHt-B?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)
  - [Explored the idea of using AI to generate initial client plans and optimize the onboarding process](https://fathom.video/share/xEKuWySkTNeiKN9RapgzyKzxoQfGHt-B?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Marcel expressed interest in leveraging Kerry's expertise to improve operations and scale the business](https://fathom.video/share/xEKuWySkTNeiKN9RapgzyKzxoQfGHt-B?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)

### Personal Updates and Office Space

  - [Marcel shared updates on his new office space in San Francisco](https://fathom.video/share/xEKuWySkTNeiKN9RapgzyKzxoQfGHt-B?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Discussed recent personal challenges (illness, home renovation)](https://fathom.video/share/xEKuWySkTNeiKN9RapgzyKzxoQfGHt-B?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)
  - [Mentioned the growth of the team, including Kyle joining as a key team member](https://fathom.video/share/xEKuWySkTNeiKN9RapgzyKzxoQfGHt-B?tab=summary&timestamp=1316.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kerry to send Marcel her personal email for further discussion on potential collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/xEKuWySkTNeiKN9RapgzyKzxoQfGHt-B?tab=summary&timestamp=1943.0)
  - [Explore options for Kerry to provide consulting services to fwd.digital (hourly or retainer basis)](https://fathom.video/share/xEKuWySkTNeiKN9RapgzyKzxoQfGHt-B?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Consider arranging for Kerry to visit the Bay Area office for in-person collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/xEKuWySkTNeiKN9RapgzyKzxoQfGHt-B?tab=summary&timestamp=1962.0)
  - [Marcel to review the recommended book "The Trusted Advisor" for account management strategies](https://fathom.video/share/xEKuWySkTNeiKN9RapgzyKzxoQfGHt-B?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
  - [Continue discussions on how Kerry can support fwd.digital's growth and operational improvements](https://fathom.video/share/xEKuWySkTNeiKN9RapgzyKzxoQfGHt-B?tab=summary&timestamp=1879.0)
